description_long: This is a sleek, modern airplane with a streamlined white fuselage accented by orange and gold stripes running along its length. The aircraft features a pair of low-mounted, swept-back wings with upward-angled winglets at the tips, enhancing aerodynamic efficiency. Two turboprop engines are mounted on the rear fuselage, each with visible propellers and nacelles. The tail section is designed with a T-tail configuration, where the horizontal stabilizer sits atop the vertical fin. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage, featuring a large, tinted windshield and several side windows for visibility. The airplane's overall design suggests it is intended for business or private use, with a focus on speed and efficiency.
description: A modern white airplane with orange and gold stripes, low swept-back wings with winglets, rear-mounted turboprop engines, and a T-tail configuration.
description_view_0: The airplane is seen from a rear-side angle, highlighting the T-tail, rear-mounted engines, and the full length of the fuselage with its decorative stripes.
description_view_1: This rear-top view emphasizes the twin turboprop engines, spinning propellers, and the upward-angled winglets at the wingtips.
description_view_2: A side profile showing the elongated fuselage, cockpit windows, and the full span of the swept-back wings with winglets.
description_view_3: A front-top angle that showcases the pointed nose, cockpit windshield, and the symmetry of the wings and engines.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back wings with upward-angled winglets and slight dihedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin rear-mounted turboprop engines with visible propellers.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and high-mounted horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear, with main and nose gear units implied but not visible.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a large, tinted windshield and multiple side windows.
